site.title: Overseas Reactions
site.tagline: MLB, Boxing & UFC — the overseas buzz, in Japanese
site.footer: Sources: Reddit (r/baseball, r/Boxing, r/MMA, etc.). Each digest is an excerpt + translation with a link back to the source thread.

watch.title: Watch-Along with Overseas Fans
watch.lead: Game highlight videos, paired with the locals' comments from overseas threads (Reddit). The video stays pinned while the hype, the heartbreak, and the jokes scroll by — our signature watch-along.

home.heroBody: No English needed. Japanese digests of buzzing overseas (Reddit) threads, with the locals' raw comments — the hype, the trash talk, and the jokes, all of it.

threads.sportLead: Japanese digests of buzzing threads from {subreddits}, with the locals' reactions.

columns.lead: Overseas interviews and stories, retold in Japanese in the athletes' own words.
